metadata.description: Personal marketplace by ThePatriczek — strict, hook-enforced development workflows for Claude Code.

plugins.name: development-loop
plugins.description: Strict, ten-phase development loop (RESEARCH → RESEARCH-REVIEW → TDD-RED → TDD-GREEN → TDD-REVIEW → IMPLEMENTATION → IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW → REFACTOR → REFACTOR-REVIEW → OVERALL-REVIEW → LOOP). Each phase has a dedicated skill and a dedicated agent; agent-type hooks dispatch the matching phase agent on UserPromptSubmit, Write/Edit/MultiEdit, and Stop. Deep overall-review runs context-detected static analysis, security checklist, clean-code audit, and Playwright MCP E2E when available. State lives at .development-loop/<context>/STATE.md with per-iteration progress summaries at progress/iteration-<N>.md. Each phase agent supports an optional project-local extension skill (development-loop-<phase>) that is preloaded automatically when present.
